'''âz-p-h-w''' ('''kazaphewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:filk|filk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-p-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:filk|filk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-p-h-w
|-
! Lemma
| kazaphewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizaphewoko|thizaphewoko]] || [[word:jizaphewoko|jizaphewoko]] || [[word:shizaphewoko|shizaphewoko]] || [[word:kizaphewoko|kizaphewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzaphewoko|thuthuzaphewoko]] || [[word:jujuzaphewoko|jujuzaphewoko]] || [[word:shushuzaphewoko|shushuzaphewoko]] || [[word:kukuzaphewoko|kukuzaphewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozaphewoko|thozaphewoko]] || [[word:jozaphewoko|jozaphewoko]] || [[word:shozaphewoko|shozaphewoko]] || [[word:kozaphewoko|kozaphewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚzaphewoko|thĂŚzaphewoko]] || [[word:jĂŚzaphewoko|jĂŚzaphewoko]] || [[word:shĂŚzaphewoko|shĂŚzaphewoko]] || [[word:kĂŚzaphewoko|kĂŚzaphewoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazaphewoko|thazaphewoko]] || [[word:jazaphewoko|jazaphewoko]] || [[word:shazaphewoko|shazaphewoko]] || [[word:kazaphewoko|kazaphewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
